title: Historical Context Banner Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json — canonical list of archival documents requiring historical context banners.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when manifest was generated

description.description: Human-readable description of this manifest's purpose

path.description: Path relative to docs/ root (e.g. 'migration-seeds-to-br.md' or 'TRD/trd-2026-004.md')

variant.description: Banner variant to inject — must match a key in banner-variants.json

rationale.description: Why this document is archived — what historical context it captures

lastReviewed.description: ISO 8601 date string when document was last reviewed for banner correctness

status.description: 'archived' = banner required; 'review' = decision pending; 'active' = not archived

bannerInjected.description: Whether the banner has been injected into the target document

decision.description: The decision outcome for 'review' status documents

path.description: Path relative to docs/ root. Use trailing '/' for directory exclusions (e.g. 'guides/')

reason.description: Reason this file/directory must never receive a banner

archivalDirectories.description: Directories known to contain archival documents (informational, not enforced)

path.description: Directory path relative to docs/ root
